summary: High‑energy show highlighted by a unique “Warewolves” drum moment, with an overall positive impression of the recording
review: The reviewer raves about a rare “Warewolves howl” that surfaces during the drum solo (around timestamp 249), noting it as something they hadn’t heard before and that the band would develop further the next night. While no explicit comments on sound quality are given, the five‑star rating indicates strong overall satisfaction with both performance and tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; positive about the performance but no concrete data on recording quality, so rating leans on overall sentiment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or mix; reviewer’s high rating suggests the tape is at least listenable and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed set‑list commentary; focus is on a standout drum segment rather than overall pacing.

band_member_comments.Drums: Reviewer highlights a distinctive “Warewolves howl” during the drum solo, noting its rarity and excitement.
